body.title: Fix Discord bot — reconnect/stability after utility closet work lands
body.result: Auto-reconnect with exponential backoff. on_disconnect + on_error handlers. Fixed queue.Empty SILENT_EXCEPT spam.
body.description:
Fix Discord bot issues. Must wait until today's utility closet architecture work lands, since Discord will become a comms transport (T-uc-comms-module).

## Known issues
- Bot may not be reconnecting reliably after disconnects
- Channel routing may need updating for new comms architecture
- Discord as comms transport (comms://discord/*) changes the integration pattern

## Sequence
- AFTER T-uc-comms-module lands: adapt Discord bot as a comms transport
- AFTER T-uc-comms-default-channels: wire Discord channels into tab UI
- This ticket covers the immediate stability fixes

## Related
- T-uc-channel-migration (#401) — move Discord to utility closet
- T-uc-comms-module — Discord becomes a transport
